emails.subject: Vacation
emails.body: Vacation Marnie I think I need to take a half day of vacation Friday, Oct. 20th. I am involved in some church activities next weekend and I won't find out if I need this time off until tonight or Wednesday night. Is that too short of notice?

emails.subject: Vacation
emails.body: Good Morning Marnie I have received the information that I needed to officially submit my request for 1/2 vacation Friday. If this is not feasible, please let me know. Thanks dd Forwarded by Dana Davis/HOU/ECT on 10/17/2000 09:41 AM Enron North America Corp. From: Dana Davis 10/16/2000 02:45 PM
